channel.title: Howard Marks — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q4 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio. Adding to Vistra — power demand from AI.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED TRMD (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q4 2025 · 15.2% of portfolio. More Torm shipping.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED PR (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added PR in Q4 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio. Building Permian Resources.

item.title: Howard Marks: TRIMMED TORM (-35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) trimmed TORM (TORM PLC) in Q4 2025 · 7.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED SPG (+17%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added SPG (STATE STREET CORP) in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Howard Marks: TRIMMED GRAB (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) trimmed GRAB (GRAB HOLDINGS LTD) in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED XP (+63%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added XP (XP INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED ABNB (+29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added ABNB (AIRBNB INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.

item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) trimmed LILAK (LIBERTY LATIN AMERICA LTD) in Q4 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q3 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Same data center thesis as Klarman.

item.title: Howard Marks: NEW POSITION STR · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) new position STR in Q3 2025 · 5.1% of portfolio. New Sitio Royalties — mineral rights.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED TRMD (+12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q3 2025 · 14.8% of portfolio. Building Torm shipping.
